# CWE-521 negative: strong password policy before persistence (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-521-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/sha256"
	"database/sql"
	"encoding/hex"
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
	"unicode"
)

type signupPayload struct {
	Email    string `json:"email"`
	Password string `json:"password"`
}

func RegisterAccount(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) {
	var body signupPayload
	if err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&body); err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	if !strongPassword(body.Password) {
		http.Error(w, "password too weak", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	sum := sha256.Sum256([]byte(body.Password))
	hash := hex.EncodeToString(sum[:])
	_, _ = db.Exec("INSERT INTO users(email, password_hash) VALUES (?, ?)", body.Email, hash)
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusCreated)
}

func strongPassword(pw string) bool {
	if len(pw) < 12 {
		return false
	}
	var upper, lower, digit bool
	for _, r := range pw {
		switch {
		case unicode.IsUpper(r):
			upper = true
		case unicode.IsLower(r):
			lower = true
		case unicode.IsDigit(r):
			digit = true
		}
	}
	return upper && lower && digit
}
